profile.name: Yash Wadbude
profile.title: Penetration Tester & Ethical Hacker
profile.tagline: I break things on purpose, then tell you how to fix them.
profile.bio: Welcome to my portfolio! I'm Yash, an aspiring cybersecurity professional who enjoys learning, building, and solving security challenges. Whether it's creating security tools, exploring web vulnerabilities, or working through hands-on labs, I'm always looking for opportunities to improve my skills and share what I learn along the way.

education.info: I have completed my Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Computer Technology from Priyadarshini College of Engineering, Nagpur. Throughout my academic journey, I developed strong foundations in programming, networking, and cybersecurity. I continue to enhance my technical skills through hands-on projects, security research, and practical learning.

Completed Higher Secondary Education (12th) from Nabira Mahavidyalaya, Katol. Developed foundational knowledge in science, mathematics, and analytical thinking.This academic experience laid the groundwork for my further studies in Computer Technology.

education.institution: SRK Arvind Indo Public School Jalalkheda
education.info: Completed 10th board education from SRK Arvind Indo Public School, Jalalkheda. Established strong academic fundamentals and problem-solving abilities. Began my learning journey that led toward computer technology and engineering.

projectsFallback.name: NoCostNights
projectsFallback.description: A full-stack streaming application built for scale, using Spring Boot microservices and a responsive frontend.

projectsFallback.name: Hand-Gesture-to-text-Translator
